zh.Caverswall, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾卡維斯瓦爾
zh.Bromley, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾布羅姆利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Bromley於1251年出生在英國斯塔福爾布羅姆利時，他的父親Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley49歲，母親Philippa Bagot11248歲。他和Elizabeth de Knocton至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1297年在英國斯塔福爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.Caverswall, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾卡維斯瓦爾
zh-hans.Bromley, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾布羅姆利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Bromley于1251年出生在英国斯塔福爾布羅姆利时，他的父亲Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley49岁，母亲Philippa Bagot11248岁。他和Elizabeth de Knocton至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1297年在英国斯塔福爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bromley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Bromley, in Essex, Hertfordshire, Kent (now in Greater London), Greater London, Greater Manchester, Staffordshire, Shropshire, and elsewhere. Most are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, but Bromley (near Bow) in Greater London is from Old English bræmbel ‘bramble’ + lēah.

variants.name: Brimley
meanings: habitational name, perhaps from Brimley in Devon or Brimbley in Stoke Abbott, Dorset, both named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Brumley
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Bromley  . This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Bromley was born in 1251, in Bromley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley, was 49 and his mother, Philippa Bagot, was 11248. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Elizabeth de Knocton. He died in 1297, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Bromley est né en 1251, à Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Philippa Bagot, avait 11248 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth de Knocton. Il est décédé en 1297, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Bromley 1251 in Bromley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley 49 und seine Mutter Philippa Bagot 11248. Er hatte mit Elizabeth de Knocton mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Bromley è nato il nel 1251 nel Bromley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Bagot, aveva 11248 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Elizabeth de Knocton. Morì nel 1297, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Bromleyが1251年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロムリーで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromleyは49歳，母Philippa Bagotは11248歳であった。彼はElizabeth de Knoctonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1297年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Bromley(이)가 1251년 영국 스태퍼드실르 브롬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Bagot(은)는 11248세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Knocton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Caverswall, Staffordshire, England: Caverswall, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Bromley nasceu em 1251, em Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Bagot, tinha 11248 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Elizabeth de Knocton. Ele faleceu em 1297, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Bromley родился в 1251 г. в местности бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Bagot, 11248. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Elizabeth de Knocton. Он умер в 1297 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Bromley nació en 1251, en Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey Galfridus de Bromley, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Philippa Bagot, tenía 11248 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Elizabeth de Knocton. Murió en 1297, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
